title: Zrikon's Military Armor
description: A mod that adds Special Ops armor for decor in vanilla style
body:
A mod that adds Special Ops armor for decor in vanilla style

Adds 10 sets of armor with some variations differing in the number of attachments 

You can also activate body kits. Use the flashlight on your helmet and night vision device.

![winter ops armor](https://i.gyazo.com/2de30aa0aaa8e7da367bc8976b3fcde2.png)

![black ops armor](https://i.gyazo.com/2088cc067d1a692bf363d3028c2c3eb6.png)

![armors 1](https://i.gyazo.com/784bf4301d694b74225766e206369cd5.png)

![armors 2](https://i.gyazo.com/d76cec43ce6fc80e4e2776f7431e4e37.png)

![armor 3](https://i.gyazo.com/aa43c05050304306760d33476653d54a.png)
